name: Sport Headphones
description: Stay aware while exercising with the best bone conduction and open-ear sport headphones for running, cycling, and workouts.
longDescription: We tested 12 open-ear and bone conduction headphones for sound quality, comfort during exercise, battery life, and sweat resistance. These keep you aware of your surroundings while delivering great audio.
